title: TopRepo Collection
description: Array of TopRepo records. Each element: Top-ranked artifact repository by GitHub stars, with paper metadata and activity info.

TopRepo.description: Top-ranked artifact repository by GitHub stars, with paper metadata and activity info.

title.description: Paper title associated with this repository, as published in proceedings.
examples: Understanding and Detecting Software Upgrade Failures in Distributed Systems
title.title: Title

stars.description: GitHub star count at time of collection, e.g. 14340.
stars.title: Stars

forks.description: GitHub fork count at time of collection, e.g. 1852.
forks.title: Forks

authors.description: Comma-separated author names, e.g. 'Fan Yang 0024, Lidong Zhou, Mao Yang 0004 et al.'.
authors.title: Authors

github_org.description: GitHub organization or user who owns the repo, e.g. 'microsoft'. Empty if not parsed.
github_org.title: Github Org

badges.description: Comma-separated badge names, e.g. 'available,functional,reproduced'. Empty if none.
badges.title: Badges

last_active.description: Last activity date in YYYY-MM format, e.g. '2024-07'. Empty if unknown.
last_active.title: Last Active

description.description: Repository description from GitHub. Empty if not set.
description.title: Description

language.description: Primary programming language as reported by GitHub, e.g. 'Python'. Empty if unknown.
language.title: Language

conference.description: Conference where the artifact was published, e.g. 'OSDI', 'USENIXSEC'.
conference.title: Conference

area.description: Research area: 'systems' or 'security', determined by the conference.
area.title: Area

TopRepo.title: TopRepo
